subcodes.title: Words spoken at Sacy home in Paris, 1911-10-29
subcodes.first_line: I am from a far away country and here in Paris, at your table, I find in union, love and happiness, Persians, Arabs, Turks and French
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @war and peace, @oneness; unity of religion, @transcendence; unknowability of God
